segments.text: Run for cover, O sons of Benjamin; flee from Jerusalem! Sound the ram’s horn in Tekoa; send up a signal over Beth-haccherem, for disaster looms from the north, even great destruction.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: Though she is beautiful and delicate, I will destroy the Daughter of Zion.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: Shepherds and their flockswill come against her; they will pitch their tents all around her, each tending his own portion:
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: ‘Prepare for battle against her; rise up, let us attack at noon. Woe to us, for the daylight is fading; the evening shadows grow long.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: Rise up, let us attack by night and destroy her fortresses!’
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: For this is what the LORD of Hosts says:
Cut down the trees and raise a siege ramp against Jerusalem. This city must be punished; there is nothing but oppression in her midst.
segments.speaker: the Lord of Hosts

segments.text: As a well gushes its water, so she pours out her evil. Violence and destruction resound in her; sickness and wounds are ever before Me.
segments.speaker: the Lord of Hosts

segments.text: Be forewarned, O Jerusalem, or I will turn away from you; I will make you a desolation, a land without inhabitant.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: This is what the LORD of Hosts says:
Glean the remnant of Israelas thoroughly as a vine. Pass your hand once more like a grape gathererover the branches.
segments.speaker: the Lord of Hosts

segments.text: To whom can I give this warning? Who will listen to me? Look, their ears are closed,  so they cannot hear. See, the word of the LORD has become offensive to them; they find no pleasure in it.
But I am full of the LORD’s wrath; I am tired of holding it back.
Pour it out on the children in the street, and on the young men gathered together. For both husband and wife will be captured, the old and the very old alike.
segments.speaker: the Lord of Hosts

segments.text: Their houses will be turned over to others, their fields and wives as well, for I will stretch out My handagainst the inhabitants of the land,
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: declares the LORD.
For from the least of them to the greatest, all are greedy for gain; from prophet to priest, all practice deceit.
segments.speaker: the Lord of Hosts

segments.text: They dress the wound of My peoplewith very little care, saying, ‘Peace, peace,’when there is no peace at all.
segments.speaker: the Lord of Hosts

segments.text:
Are they ashamed of the abomination they have committed? No, they have no shame at all; 
they do not even know how to blush. So they will fall among the fallen; when I punish them, they will collapse,
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: says the LORD.
This is what the LORD says:
St and at the crossroads and look. Ask for the ancient paths: ‘Where is the good way?’Then walk in it, and you will find rest for your souls. But they said, ‘We will not walk in it!’
segments.speaker: People of Israel

segments.text:
I appointed watchmen over you and said,‘Listen for the sound of the ram’s horn.’
But they answered, ‘We will not listen!’
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text:
Therefore hear, O nations, and learn, O congregations, 
what will happen to them.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Hear, O earth! I am bringing disaster on this people, the fruit of their own schemes, because they have paid no attention to My word and have rejected My instruction.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: What use to Me is frankincense from Shebaor sweet cane from a distant land? Your burnt offerings are not acceptable; your sacrifices do not please Me.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Therefore this is what the LORD says:

I will lay stumbling blocks before this people; fathers and sons alike will be staggered; 
friends and neighbors will perish.
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text: This is what the LORD says:
Behold, an army is comingfrom the land of the north; a great nation is stirred upfrom the ends of the earth.
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text: They grasp the bow and spear;  they are cruel and merciless. Their voice roars like the sea, and they ride upon horses, lined up like men in formationagainst you, O Daughter of Zion.
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text: We have heard the report; our hands hang limp. Anguish has gripped us, pain like that of a woman in labor.
Do not go out to the fields; do not walk the road. For the enemy has a sword; terror is on every side.
O daughter of my people, dress yourselves in sackcloth and roll in ashes. Mourn with bitter wailing, as you would for an only son, for suddenly the destroyerwill come upon us.
I have appointed you to examine My people like ore,  so you may know and try their ways.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: All are hardened rebels, walking around as slanderers. They are bronze and iron; all of them are corrupt.
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text: The bellows blow fiercely, blasting away the lead with fire. The refining proceeds in vain, for the wicked are not purged.
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text: They are called rejected silver, because the LORD has rejected them.
segments.speaker: the Lord
